name: Kishirika Kishirisu
alt_names: The Great Empress of the Demon Realm
description:
Kishirika Kishirisu is The Great Empress of the Demon Realm. She is the demon empress known for her demon eyes' powers and the ability to bestow others with demon eyes. She is engaged to [Badigadi](https://anilist.co/character/262620/Badigadi), the demon lord of immortality.

__Light Novel Volume 4 Spoiler__
~!Kishirika Kishirisu is the person that is responsible for giving [Rudeus](https://anilist.co/character/88348/Rudeus-Greyrat) his demon eye, among other favors!~
